reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención, por la noche sobre todo, lentos, no se manejan bien  no tienen los descuentos correspondientes con la aplicación, la verdad que el Aca una vez más no la volvería a elegir..  vayan a López y planes no más gente

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster, especially at night. They're slow, they don't know how to use the system, and they don't have the discounts available through the app. Honestly, I wouldn't choose Aca again. Go to López y Planes instead.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbWUtOHV3RRAB
